sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kei tang hong si Jesuh’ maitang,
Laktoh ni ciang ka mu ding.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka Honpa maitang ka mu ding,
A vangliatna ka tel siang ding,
Nung ciang ka mu ding, Amah.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong liah, hong dal khat om lai a,
Ka mu cian thei nai kei hi;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Maitang kimu ding nuam si’n teh,
Hong Tanpa mai ka mu ding.
